CustomField.description: Fully qualified Apex class name that implements the trigger action logic. The class must extend TRG_Base and implement the appropriate IF_Trigger interface (e.g. IF_Trigger.BeforeInsert). For managed package classes, include the namespace prefix (e.g. kern.TRG_SetFoobarDefaults). Set this OR Flow Name, never both — deploys that populate both fields or neither are blocked by a validation rule on this object. Leave blank to configure a flow action via Flow Name.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the Apex class name (with namespace prefix for managed-package classes). Leave blank if this row is a flow action — set Flow Name instead. Cannot set both.
CustomField.label: Apex Class Name
